case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. JESSY RUIZ NAVARRO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT NAVARRO, JESSY RUIZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-11-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-11-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-11-2019 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN,INC. REPRESENTED BY GUADALUPE ACEVEDO COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT JESSY RUIZ NAVARRO DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED DEC-11-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT NAVARRO, JESSY RUIZ
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-11-2019 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NAVARRO, JESSY RUIZ $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
RETURN MAIL - NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT - SENT TO PLAINTIFF
